## Meeting Purpose

[Connect Saket and Marcel, discuss GrowthX's rapid growth strategies, and explore potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX achieved impressive growth (60+ customers, $3M+ revenue) in 1 year through relationship-building, workshops, and value-driven content](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [Marcel emphasizes the importance of founders/CEOs being public-facing and consistently sharing valuable insights](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Content strategy should focus on addressing key pain points and providing in-depth, practical knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Potential collaboration opportunities between Nexla and GrowthX for content creation and thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Rapid Growth Strategy

  - [Focused on building relationships and trust through high-value workshops](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Gave away extensive knowledge, templates, and processes openly](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Leveraged social proof from high-profile clients (e.g., Ramp, Webflow) to attract more business](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [Minimal traditional marketing; growth primarily through word-of-mouth and relationships](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)

### Content Creation and Thought Leadership

  - [Emphasis on creating in-depth, practical content that addresses specific pain points](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Examples: whiteboarding videos, technical guides, glossaries](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [Importance of founders/CEOs being active in content creation and social media](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Focus on simplifying complex topics and clearly articulating solutions to industry problems](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)

### Case Study: Augment Code

  - [GrowthX produced 120+ guides in 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
  - [10x increase in AI visibility](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [Significant traffic growth (300 new visitors/day) to guide and MCP sections](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [Improved search rankings and mentions in AI-generated answers](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)

### Nexla's Current Content Strategy

  - [Saket writes weekly/bi-weekly on relevant industry topics](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
  - [Content leads to media interviews and thought leadership opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
  - [Focus on data and AI challenges, industry analysis, and practical insights](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Potential areas for improvement: increased cadence, more channels, varied content types](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)

### Strategies for Building Authority

  - [Consider creating a cohort-based course on Maven or similar platform](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Develop a "mastermind" course outline based on industry demand](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1881.0)
  - [Use customer network to gain initial traction and validation](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)
  - [Iterate and improve course content based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1943.0)
  - [Combine long-form content with social media posts and website optimization](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1972.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule podcast interview with Marcel for Saket's AI builders series](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=2094.0)
  - [Tyler (GrowthX) to follow up with details on how they work with startups](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=2085.0)
  - [Explore potential collaboration opportunities between Nexla and GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [Consider developing a cohort-based course or workshop series for Nexla](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
  - [Evaluate Nexla's current content strategy and identify areas for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
  - [Create a shared Slack channel for easier communication between teams](https://fathom.video/share/EtzTNd2yUCtkc6pxbbsz-2QXduz11Mzy?tab=summary&timestamp=2089.0)
